old_value: {"id":"smallhold-0pk","title":"Outbound Create Note activity generation","description":"On post creation, generate and enqueue an outbound Create{Note} ActivityPub activity to all relevant inboxes. For public/unlisted posts: all followers. For private posts: only followers. For direct posts: only mentioned actors. Collapse deliveries to shared inbox URLs before enqueuing (one delivery per unique inbox URL, not one per follower).","design":"Visibility → to/cc: public → to:[AS2Public], cc:[followers_url]. unlisted → to:[followers_url], cc:[AS2Public]. private → to:[followers_url]. direct → to:[mentioned_actor_uris]. Note.id = ap_id. Note.url = status URL. Collapse by shared_inbox_url: for each follower, use shared_inbox_url if available, else inbox_url. Dedup. Enqueue one row per unique URL.","acceptance_criteria":"After post creation, delivery_queue has correct number of rows (deduped by shared inbox); activity JSON is valid AP; Note object includes correct @context, to/cc fields indicating visibility; mentions are in the tag array; hashtags are in the tag array","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:03:45Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:03:45Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-4xr","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:03:50Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
